name: Streusel Cream Cheese Cake
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. For the batter, cream margarine and sugar until smooth. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in dry ingredients until just combined. Pour 2/3 of the batter into a prepared springform pan. In a separate bowl, blend cheese filling ingredients until smooth. Spread evenly over the batter. Top with remaining batter and sprinkle with streusel topping. Bake for 45 minutes or until set.
